title: August 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 11''' is the 223rd day of the year (224th in leap years). There are 142 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Morgan Upton]] is born.
*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Weston Gavin]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Christine Hewett]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Ian McDiarmid]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Roger Craig Smith]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Jesse Harlin]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[Planet of Kadril]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1994]] – [[Peter Cushing]] dies.
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Luke Skywalker's Walkabout]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' short "[[The Machine in the Ghost]]" first airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Obsessed With Star Wars]]'' reissued in paperback.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 8|''The High Republic'' (2021) 8]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak 1|''The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 204|''Star Wars Insider'' 204]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Princess and the Jedi / Kai's Bad Day]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' to be reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2026 – [[Cloak of Deception (unabridged audiobook)|''Cloak of Deception'' audiobook]] to be released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2026 – ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' to be reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2026 – [[Labyrinth of Evil (unabridged audiobook)|''Labyrinth of Evil'' audiobook]] to be released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
<noinclude>
